title: uncaria gambir
intro: Uncaria gambir, also known as Gambir, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Uncaria gambir include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to lower fever and treat respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Uncaria gambir is often used in the form of a resin or extract, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the skin to harness its medicinal properties.
